'''Jintar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] and the husband of [[Dinua Jeban]]. He had two children with her, [[Shalk]] and [[Briila]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
